series_metadata.series_title: APPLICATIONS BOARD OF NURSING MEDICATION CARD
series_metadata.series_description: This series consist of documentation submitted to receive a Board of Nursing medication card, and documentation submitted to receive a Board of Nursing IV therapy card.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: Microfilm retained . ; Paper: paper original or microfilm or electronic media verified. ; Electronic: Electronically imaged copy retained
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
